mdRecord.dcterms:title: Fiduciary Accounts: Guardianship of Eliza Pratt, Who reached the age of 21 Years of age by 01.08.1889
mdRecord.dcterms:description: Guardianship of Eliza Pratt, Who reached the age of 21 Years of age by 01.08.1889 Guardianship of Margaret, Hannah and Martha Pratt J. T. Knowles, Guardian Recorded in Ledger 3, Page 168, in the Floyd County Courthouse
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Court Records
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
